title: Emissive Spartan
description: Adds glow to some stuff from Spartan Weaponry
body:
Ever wished those textures would have a glow for that true magical feel? If yes, then you're at the right destination.
 This texture pack will also make all Spartan Weaponry addons glow.
 IMPORTANT: Must have OptiFine in order to work!
P.S.
(YDM's Weapon Master mod was used in all screenshots)
